description.value: Aura faint enchantment and evocation; CL 5th; Slot headband; Price 7,700 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This multicolored headband with beaded tassels tips luck in the wearerâs favor. The wearer gains a +1 luck bonus on saving throws. Any effect that gives the wearer a luck bonus (such as a divine favor or prayer spell) or explicitly increases the wearerâs good luck (such as a witchâs fortune hex, the Luck domainâs bit of luck domain power, and so on) lasts for 1 round longer than normal on the wearer. Abilities without a time-based duration (such as carrying a stone of good luck ) are unaffected by the headband. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, ill omen or prayer; Cost 3,850 gp.
